title: Forgotten Lands
description: Explore new dimensions, biomes, and structures with powerful new weapons and more to play with...
body:
I strongly recommend using JEI (Just Enough Items Mod)

                                    Forge 1.16.5 +36.2.36 and above also recommended

                  Build versions next to file names are not minecraft versions that they'll work on.
                  Those numbers are the version of the mod and 1.10.2.1 is the latest and most bug-free version at the moment. 


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[Wiki page is also now ready, you can check it out !](https://f1d54068-3cef-464a-82de-26e1423a01ea.mynotice.io/)
                                          
 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F67ErzzNTiQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 
With blueprint crafts, decorations, new weapons and items that can be benefitted from early game to end game, Interesting and rewarding places and structres to visit, Im happy to say I finished the mod I've been working on for a long time.

 

There are;

+3 New Dimensions with their respective 7 biomes in total,

+10 new points of interest inside of Forgotten lands that include new Fossils that can be mined for Soul Swords and bone armor materials, infinite mineshafts that can be found the underground that goes forever, and a huge temple to explore.(Think it as a Vanilla stronghold, locating and exploring this temple is the main goal of my mod, I dont want to spoil anything. I just hope you guys like.)

+32~ New Blocks,

+5 New Decorations (Vases,stool,White Rose),

+17 Weapons,

+6 Armor Pieces,

+3 Powerful Items, Submarine and more to play with...

 

I strongly recommend using JEI because there is a lot of custom crafts and expecting a new player to go trial and error for every recipe would ruin the fun.

I also prepared a Item called "Bone Boiler Recipes" which is a book can be crafted on smithing table that shows "Bone Boiler"(new crafting station) recipes since they dont appear on JEI.

 

(QuickNote:My mod really doesnt work well with shaderpacks, i would recommend turning them off while playing.)

 

When i started making this mod 1.16.5 was latest version of minecraft and I made it with the time left from school and other things, and now mojang is releasing 1.20.

I still have plans for recoding my mod for higher versions but i can't give any promises.

In short, I hope you guys like playing.
If you guys have suggestions or want to report a bug here is my discord: Semi#0492

(Im still working on bug fixes i know)


I also had a small showcase demo video if you guys are interested:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aE2VwzBxJTM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
